contextThreshold.label: Context Threshold
contextThreshold.help: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0.0–1.0)

incrementalMaxDepth.label: Incremental Max Depth
incrementalMaxDepth.help: How deep incremental compaction goes (0 = leaf only, -1 = unlimited)

freshTailCount.label: Fresh Tail Count
freshTailCount.help: Number of recent messages protected from compaction

summaryModel.label: Summary Model
summaryModel.help: Model override for LCM summarization (e.g., 'gpt-5.4' or 'openai-resp/gpt-5.4')

useTokenizer.label: Use Precise Tokenizer
useTokenizer.help: Use HuggingFace tokenizer service instead of chars/4 heuristic

proxy.label: Proxy URL
proxy.help: HTTP(S) proxy for tokenizer downloads from HuggingFace

contextThreshold.description: Fraction of context window that triggers compaction (0.0–1.0)

incrementalMaxDepth.description: How deep incremental compaction goes (0 = leaf only, -1 = unlimited)

freshTailCount.description: Number of recent messages protected from compaction

largeFileThresholdTokens.description: Token threshold for treating files as 'large'

useTokenizer.description: Use precise tokenizer service instead of chars/4 heuristic

proxy.description: HTTP(S) proxy URL for tokenizer downloads from HuggingFace

timezone.description: IANA timezone for timestamps in summaries

pruneHeartbeatOk.description: Delete HEARTBEAT_OK turn cycles from LCM storage
